channel.title: Visualization on Nate Glenn's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Visualization on Nate Glenn's Blog

item.title: My New Toy: Algomation
item.author: garfieldnate <at> gmail <dot> com (Nathan Glenn)
item.description: Lately I’ve been losing sleep trying to understand an algorithm I read about in an academic publication. Part of the problem was that the application I was applying it to required a sort of reversal, which was confusing. But a bigger part of the problem was that I just couldn’t “see” it. I’d lay in bed, trying to imagine working with ping-pong balls on a string, or marbles on fishing line, or anything I could really get my “mind’s hands” on.
